name: Chocolate Peanut Cream Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Cup Peanuts, Salted, Roasted In Oil
recipeInstructions:
1. To make chocolate filling: Cream butter and 1/2 cup sugar until smooth.
Add egg and beat for 2-3 minutes. Stir in melted chocolate chips.
Spread 1 cup of the mixture over the baked pie crust. Set aside the
remaining chocolate mixture.
2. Sprinkle 1 cup of peanuts over the chocolate layer.
3. For peanut filling: In a bowl, combine softened cream cheese, peanut butter,
sifted powdered sugar, and egg until smooth.
Gently fold in whipped cream to create a light batter.
4. Spoon the peanut filling over the chocolate layer.
5. Spread the reserved chocolate mixture evenly over the peanut filling,
leaving at least 2 inches of space around the edges.
6. Sprinkle the remaining peanuts along the outer edge of the pie.
7. Refrigerate until set, about 2 hours or overnight.
